checks.lint: PASS — 0 errors, 71 pre-existing warnings (no new warnings introduced)

settings_context_usememo.detail: useMemo added to Provider value with correct dependency array [settings, loaded, updateSetting]. Eliminates unnecessary re-renders for all useGeneralSettings() consumers. Note: useMemo is called inline within JSX return rather than extracted above the return statement — functionally correct and passes all linters, but unconventional style.

taskitem_usetoday.detail: useToday imported and used. Overdue check changed from `new Date(task.dueDate) < new Date()` to string comparison `task.dueDate.split('T')[0] < today`, eliminating per-render Date allocations.

today_usetoday.detail: useToday imported and used, replacing `toDateKey(new Date())` inline call. `todayDate` used for TaskInput defaultDueDate prop, eliminating redundant Date construction.
